basics.name: Juan David Peralta Fuentes
basics.label: Backend Developer with 4+ years of experience. Specialist in Python, TypeScript, and cloud technologies. Focused on scalable APIs, distributed architectures, and microservices. DevOps with Kubernetes and CI/CD.
basics.summary: Backend Developer with over 4 years of experience specializing in Python, TypeScript, and cloud technologies. I have led teams in diverse environments optimizing systems that directly impact business metrics. Strong experience in DevOps with Kubernetes and CI/CD practices. Focused on clean code, scalable architectures, and high-impact deliveries.

work.name: Finance Tracker
work.summary: Developing full-stack finance tracker with Clean Architecture DDD (15 business domains), Express 5 + MongoDB/Mongoose backend and Telegram bot with NLP (Groq) for natural-language expense parsing in Spanish. Integrating OCR (Tesseract) + Whisper transcription for receipt and voice-based expense capture, with event-driven notification system and AES-256-GCM encryption for sensitive financial data.
highlights: Clean Architecture DDD with 15 business domains
Bank-specific CSV importers with AI category mapping

work.name: Ruta Oncologica
work.summary: Built Express 5 + TypeScript backend with 39 endpoints for oncology patient tracking (8,800+ lines), integrating SQL Server cross-database queries with Redis caching and BullMQ async workers. Replaced N+1 queries with batch patterns across 9 hospitalization endpoints, reducing database round trips by 90%.
highlights: Express 5 + TypeScript + SQL Server + Redis + BullMQ
90% reduction in database round trips via batch patterns
KPIs with SQL CTE priority windows (ROW_NUMBER, COUNT DISTINCT)

work.name: GlowPic
work.summary: Developed REST API with FastAPI implementing Clean Architecture and SOLID principles, resulting in 85% more maintainable and scalable code for user management and multimedia storage in production. Implemented automatic Swagger/OpenAPI documentation and deployment on Render, reducing developer onboarding from 2 days to 30 minutes.
